lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is immaculate and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical components, including the engine and transmission, are in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has major cosmetic damage on the interior and exterior. The mechanical components require significant repairs to be functional.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been kept in a climate-controlled garage since its purchase. The exterior paint is flawless with no chips or scratches, and the interior remains immaculate, featuring premium leather seats that show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a full service history from the dealership and all systems functioning exactly as they did on day one. This is a rare find for a collector or an enthusiast seeking a vehicle that looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a reliable daily driver for someone who doesn't mind a bit of cosmetic and mechanical character. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear bumper, and some fading in the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the upholstery exhibits visible wear and some light staining on the floor mats, though all gauges and electronics remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but it will likely require a brake service and new tires in the coming months. It is a solid, functional vehicle that has been used regularly and is priced to reflect its current state of wear.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that gets the job done? This car is a solid choice for anyone needing a functional and reliable daily driver. While it shows some visible wear and tear and has been well-loved over the years, it still runs steadily and offers great value. It’s a practical option that’s ready to hit the road and serve its next owner well!

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This well-maintained specimen offers a superior driving experience, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure continued performance and reliability. With a documented service history and a refined interior, it represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning motorist seeking quality and longevity.

Hey there! I’m so excited to help this reliable beauty find a new home! It’s been such a fantastic car for me, and I’ve taken really good care of it over the years. It runs like a dream and is in wonderful shape, just waiting for its next big adventure. If you’re looking for a dependable, well-loved ride that’s ready to hit the road today, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to chat and show it to you!

Offering a mechanically robust E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 and its signature individual throttle bodies. This example retains its factory-spec 6-speed manual gearbox and M Variable Differential Lock for precise power delivery. Recent service includes preventative rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the valvetrain and VANOS system operate at peak efficiency. The chassis remains composed with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing a versatile range of compression and rebound settings. While the finish shows minor aerodynamic wear, the structural integrity and drivetrain performance are superlative for a driver-focused enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, showing only minor, typical signs of road use that are barely noticeable upon first glance. Step inside to find a clean, smoke-free interior where the upholstery has been preserved with care, showing only light softening consistent with gentle use. All onboard technology, including the navigation and premium sound system, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, responsive stopping power. This is a reliable, turn-key car that has been treated with respect and is ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and sophistication. This unit remains in commendable condition, offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. Thoroughly inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking quality and reliability at a competitive price point.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a refined aesthetic, it has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking executive-level quality and proven durability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in wonderful shape, runs super smoothly, and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It’s a reliable, comfy car that still looks fantastic on the road and is totally ready for its next adventure. I'd love to see it go to a great new home, so come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 996.2-generation Carrera features the high-revving 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six engine, producing 320hp through a precise 6-speed G96 manual transaxle. The M96 powerplant has been proactively serviced with an LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a new rear main seal. Handling is optimized via a factory-spec M030 sport suspension and staggered 18-inch lightweight alloy wheels, providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative steering feedback. The braking system utilizes four-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors for superior thermal dissipation. This driver-focused example remains mechanically robust with consistent compression across all cylinders, offering a visceral, analog driving experience for the serious enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

Meticulously maintained and ready for its next owner, this vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the interior remains a pristine, smoke-free environment with fully functional electronics and well-preserved seating. Under the hood, the car runs smoothly thanks to a consistent service history, providing a confident and quiet driving experience. With plenty of tire tread remaining and a clean overall presentation, this car represents an outstanding value for a discerning buyer looking for a reliable, high-quality ride without the showroom price tag.

This meticulously curated vehicle represents a premier selection for the sophisticated driver. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical excellence, it offers a balanced synthesis of durability and refined road presence. We invite you to experience a motorcar that exemplifies both functional integrity and enduring value, standing as a testament to its well-preserved nature.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to ensure peak operational performance. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous professional inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. Offering a sophisticated balance of reliability and refinement, this unit represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next owner! Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is super reliable and ready to hit the road. I've taken really good care of it, and I'd love to see it go to a great new home. Come take it for a spin!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S features the iconic wide-body silhouette paired with a robust M96 flat-six. The powertrain has been reinforced with a documented LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh rear main seal. Handling is sharpened via a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B8 dampers and M030-spec anti-roll bars, ensuring neutral balance through high-speed apexes. The G96 6-speed manual transaxle offers precise throws with no synchro grind, while the factory Brembo monoblock calipers provide exceptional
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Minor interior wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-cared-for daily driver. The exterior finish maintains a high gloss, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and remarkably clean; the upholstery is free of tears, and all power features, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and an engine that starts eagerly and runs quietly. It has been strictly maintained according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection just completed. The tires have substantial tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a solid, honest vehicle that delivers a premium driving experience without the premium price tag.

This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it delivers a refined driving experience and consistent performance. An ideal acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a high-caliber vehicle that offers both long-term reliability and significant value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness, this exceptional example stands as a testament to its previous stewardship. Acquisition of this unit guarantees both prestige and dependable utility.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with this reliable beauty, and she’s totally ready for her next adventure! It’s been super well-maintained and still runs like an absolute dream, making it a perfect choice for your daily commute or fun weekend getaways. It's in really solid shape and honestly feels great on the road. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—I just know you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, delivering power to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock. Mechanical highlights include a reinforced rear subframe to address common chassis fatigue and a recently serviced cooling system with a high-flow water pump. The suspension maintains its composure with refreshed bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, ensuring the chassis remains communicative under lateral load. While displaying minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains potent and the throttle response is telepathic. A well-maintained specimen ready for the apex.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor road wear one would expect from a car that has been enjoyed and cared for. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the premium upholstery remains supple, and every button and dial functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule that ensures a smooth, responsive drive and peace of mind. From the ice-cold climate control to the pristine alloy wheels wrapped in high-tread tires, this car is ready for the road. It offers the reliability of a newer model with the character of a seasoned traveler, making it an exceptional find for the discerning driver.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point mechanical inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent reliability and a documented service history. Its well-preserved interior and robust drivetrain make it an ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking engineering excellence and proven dependability.
